receipt_date.text: วันที่ใบเสร็จ

root.sql: SELECT vr_nsk_010_001000.membership_no, vr_nsk_010_001000.memname, vr_nsk_010_001000.receipt_date, vr_nsk_010_001000.kep_amount, vr_nsk_010_001000.kep_method_amount, vr_nsk_010_001000.unkeep_amount, vr_nsk_010_001000.ppm_desc, vr_nsk_010_001000.ppm_date FROM vr_nsk_010_001000 where vr_nsk_010_001000.receipt_date between '!receipt_date_1!' and '!receipt_date_2!' /*WHERE*/
